rationale: In the citing paper, Ahluwalia (2008) appears only in a grouped citation when the authors describe building a pool of fit-measurement items from prior brand extension literature. The paper does not separately discuss Ahluwalia's theory, findings, or mechanism in hypothesis development, model logic, or result interpretation. Because the citation is used as a general source in a list rather than as a distinct intellectual anchor, its role is best treated as a passing methodological/background mention.
